scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: All first-year applicants are required to submit SAT or ACT scores fall 2026 and beyond. For more information, review the standardized testing policy .

claims.claim: All first-year applicants are required to submit SAT or ACT scores fall 2026 and beyond. For more information, review the standardized testing policy .
